title: Inner Speech Decoding: A Comprehensive Review.

assets.abstract: Inner speech decoding is the process of identifying silently generated speech from neural signals. In recent years, this candidate technology has gained momentum as a possible way to support communication in severely impaired populations. Specifically, this approach promises hope for people with a variety of physical or neurological disabilities who need alternative means of verbal expression. This review covers recording modalities that range from the noninvasive EEG to the high-density electro

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.
